sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87095" key="prodouleiai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδουλ-ει-αι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, in Law, <sense id="n87095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">servitudes,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4.26.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.30.4.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
